pr-evidence/qwen3-instruct-profile-alias.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 initially found model-profile drift: the canonical Qwen/Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507 id was paired with the older 40960-token base-model context limit. The branch now sets max_context_tokens to 262144, tests that limit, and GPT-5.5 approved with no blocking findings.
scope: model profile constants, built-in Qwen3 profile metadata and aliases, vLLM smoke HF model constant, root/legacy exports, README documentation, and focused public-surface tests.

what_changed: Made Qwen3 Instruct HF model identity first-class in Cachet model profiles and vLLM smoke wiring.
pr-evidence/qwen3-instruct-profile-alias.why: The V1 target is qwen3:4b-instruct, so release metadata, aliases, and smoke serving should consistently point at the Instruct HF model while retaining the old base alias for compatibility.
